notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package primarily describes visible combat events (巨阳仙僵 vs 星宿仙尊, 秦鼎菱赌运, 方源扑杀秦鼎菱) and ordinary battlefield actions. No private knowledge, secret motives/plans, or future-known information is directly supported by the source pointers. The events are all publicly observable conflicts and outcomes. No hidden fact candidate can be extracted without speculating or restating visible events.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed shows behaviors (巨阳仙僵被秦鼎菱拖累落入下风, 秦鼎菱化解巨阳仙僵后劲) but motive is ambiguous. Observed actions could stem from multiple possible motives (秦鼎菱可能是故意拖累也可能是实力不足). No direct source supports a specific inferred motive. Cannot make a cautious one-step inference without overreaching.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed package focuses on high-level individual combat between venerables (巨阳仙僵, 星宿仙尊, 秦鼎菱, 方源, 乐土) and does not present any named collective faction, clan, family, or group with a concrete stake. Entities like 疯魔三怪 are a title for a single person ('single_person_title'), not a collective. 天庭 is mentioned in source pointers (ptr_13, ptr_14, ptr_15) as an affiliation of individuals (秦鼎菱, 星宿仙尊, 明皓仙子) but is not listed as an entity or relation in the seed, and no collective stake or pressure axis for 天庭 as a faction is directly supported by the seed facts. No named collective actor with a concrete stake can be extracted.
IF export filter quarantined 8 legacy old-schema branches.
